lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਗਹਿਰ ਗਭੀਰੁ ਹੈ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਅਘਖੰਡੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur gahir gabheer hai sukh saagar aghakhandd |
lines.english: The True Guru is the Deep and Profound Ocean of Peace, the Destroyer of sin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਆਪਣਾ ਜਮਦੂਤ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਡੰਡੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin gur seviaa aapanaa jamadoot na laagai ddandd |
lines.english: For those who serve their Guru, there is no punishment at the hands of the Messenger of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਆ ਸੁਖੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਮੰਡੁ ॥੪॥੨੦॥੯੦॥
lines.translit: naam nidhaan satigur deea sukh naanak man meh mandd |4|20|90|
lines.english: The True Guru has bestowed the Treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord. O Nanak, the mind is filled with peace. ||4||20||90||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਨਾਲਿ ਤੁਲਿ ਨ ਲਗਈ ਖੋਜਿ ਡਿਠਾ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਡੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur naal tul na lagee khoj dditthaa brahamandd |
lines.english: There is none to compare with the Guru; I have searched and looked throughout the entire universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਠਾ ਕਰਿ ਕੈ ਖਾਇਆ ਕਉੜਾ ਉਪਜਿਆ ਸਾਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: mitthaa kar kai khaaeaa kaurraa upajiaa saad |
lines.english: People eat what they believe to be sweet, but it turns out to be bitter in taste.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਮੀਤ ਸੁਰਿਦ ਕੀਏ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਰਚਿਆ ਬਾਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee meet surid kee bikhiaa rachiaa baad |
lines.english: They attach their affections to brothers and friends, uselessly engrossed in corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਂਦੇ ਬਿਲਮ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਬਿਸਮਾਦੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jaande bilam na hovee vin naavai bisamaad |1|
lines.english: They vanish without a moment's delay; without God's Name, they are stunned and amazed. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਦੀਸੈ ਸੋ ਵਿਣਸਣਾ ਮਨ ਕੀ ਮਤਿ ਤਿਆਗੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo deesai so vinasanaa man kee mat tiaag |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Whatever is seen, shall pass away. Abandon the intellectualizations of your mind. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਸਤਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਲਾਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: mere man satagur kee sevaa laag |
lines.english: O my mind, attach yourself to the service of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਭੀ ਜੰਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਈ ਭਖੁ ਅਭਖੁ ਸਭ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: lobhee jant na jaanee bhakh abhakh sabh khaae |
lines.english: the greedy person, unaware, consumes everything, edible and non-edible alike.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਕੂਕਰੁ ਹਰਕਾਇਆ ਧਾਵੈ ਦਹ ਦਿਸ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jiau kookar harakaaeaa dhaavai deh dis jaae |
lines.english: Like the mad dog running around in all directions,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਮਦਿ ਬਿਆਪਿਆ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੋਨੀ ਪਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh mad biaapiaa fir fir jonee paae |2|
lines.english: Engrossed in the intoxication of sexual desire and anger, people wander through reincarnation over and over again. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਜਾਲੁ ਪਸਾਰਿਆ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਚੋਗ ਬਣਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa jaal pasaariaa bheetar chog banaae |
lines.english: Maya has spread out her net, and in it, she has placed the bait.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਪੰਖੀ ਫਾਸਿਆ ਨਿਕਸੁ ਨ ਪਾਏ ਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: trisanaa pankhee faasiaa nikas na paae maae |
lines.english: The bird of desire is caught, and cannot find any escape, O my mother.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਤਾ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਨ ਜਾਣਈ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jin keetaa tiseh na jaanee fir fir aavai jaae |3|
lines.english: One who does not know the Lord who created him, comes and goes in reincarnation over and over again. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਪ੍ਰਕਾਰੀ ਮੋਹਿਆ ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਇਹੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: anik prakaaree mohiaa bahu bidh ihu sansaar |
lines.english: By various devices, and in so many ways, this world is enticed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਰਖੈ ਸੋ ਰਹੈ ਸੰਮ੍ਰਿਥੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis no rakhai so rahai samrith purakh apaar |
lines.english: They alone are saved, whom the All-powerful, Infinite Lord protects.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਉਧਰੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੁ ॥੪॥੨੧॥੯੧॥
lines.translit: har jan har liv udhare naanak sad balihaar |4|21|91|
lines.english: The servants of the Lord are saved by the Love of the Lord. O Nanak, I am forever a sacrifice to them. ||4||21||91||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 5 ghar 2 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਇਲਿ ਆਇਆ ਗੋਇਲੀ ਕਿਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਡੰਫੁ ਪਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: goeil aaeaa goeilee kiaa tis ddanf pasaar |
lines.english: The herdsman comes to the pasture lands-what good are his ostentatious displays here?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ਮਨਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har gun gaau manaa satigur sev piaar |
lines.english: O mind, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, and serve the True Guru with love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਹਲਤਿ ਪੁੰਨੀ ਚਲਣਾ ਤੂੰ ਸੰਮਲੁ ਘਰ ਬਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: muhalat punee chalanaa toon samal ghar baar |1|
lines.english: When your allotted time is up, you must go. Take care of your real hearth and home. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਥੋੜੜੀ ਬਾਤ ਗੁਮਾਨੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa thorrarree baat gumaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Why do you take pride in trivial matters? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸੇ ਰੈਣਿ ਪਰਾਹੁਣੇ ਉਠਿ ਚਲਸਹਿ ਪਰਭਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaise rain paraahune utth chalaseh parabhaat |
lines.english: Like an overnight guest, you shall arise and depart in the morning.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੀ ਮੇਰੀ ਕਿਆ ਕਰਹਿ ਜਿਨਿ ਦੀਆ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਲੋੜਿ ॥
lines.translit: meree meree kiaa kareh jin deea so prabh lorr |
lines.english: Why do you say, "Mine, mine"? Look to God, who has given it to you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਤੂੰ ਰਤਾ ਗਿਰਸਤ ਸਿਉ ਸਭ ਫੁਲਾ ਕੀ ਬਾਗਾਤਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kiaa toon rataa girasat siau sabh fulaa kee baagaat |2|
lines.english: Why are you so attached to your household? It is all like flowers in the garden. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਭ੍ਰਮਤਿਆ ਦੁਲਭ ਜਨਮੁ ਪਾਇਓਇ ॥
lines.translit: lakh chauraaseeh bhramatiaa dulabh janam paaeoe |
lines.english: Through 8.4 million incarnations you have wandered, to obtain this rare and precious human life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਪਰ ਉਠੀ ਚਲਣਾ ਛਡਿ ਜਾਸੀ ਲਖ ਕਰੋੜਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sarapar utthee chalanaa chhadd jaasee lakh karorr |3|
lines.english: It is certain that you must arise and depart, and leave behind your hundreds of thousands and millions. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ਤੂੰ ਸੋ ਦਿਨੁ ਨੇੜਾ ਆਇਓਇ ॥੪॥੨੨॥੯੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam samaal toon so din nerraa aaeoe |4|22|92|
lines.english: O Nanak, remember the Naam, the Name of the Lord; the day of departure is drawing near! ||4||22||92||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਸਾਥੀ ਉਠੀ ਚਲਿਆ ਤਾ ਧਨ ਖਾਕੂ ਰਾਲਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jaa saathee utthee chaliaa taa dhan khaakoo raal |1|
lines.english: But when the companion arises and departs, then the body-bride mingles with dust. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਚਰੁ ਵਸਹਿ ਸੁਹੇਲੜੀ ਜਿਚਰੁ ਸਾਥੀ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: tichar vaseh suhelarree jichar saathee naal |
lines.english: As long as the soul-companion is with the body, it dwells in happiness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਬੈਰਾਗੁ ਭਇਆ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਦੇਖਣੈ ਕਾ ਚਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man bairaag bheaa darasan dekhanai kaa chaau |
lines.english: My mind has become detached from the world; it longs to see the Vision of God's Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਚਰੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਕੰਤੁ ਘਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਜੀਉ ਸਭਿ ਕਹਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: jichar vasiaa kant ghar jeeo jeeo sabh kahaat |
lines.english: As long as the soul-husband dwells in the body-house, everyone greets you with respect.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਸੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਥਾਨੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dhan su teraa thaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Blessed is Your Place. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੇਈਅੜੈ ਸਹੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਤੂੰ ਸਾਹੁਰੜੈ ਸੁਖਿ ਵਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: peeearrai sahu sev toon saahurarrai sukh vas |
lines.english: In this world of your parents' home, serve your Husband Lord; in the world beyond, in your in-laws' home, you shall dwell in peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਉਠੀ ਚਲਸੀ ਕੰਤੜਾ ਤਾ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਪੁਛੈ ਤੇਰੀ ਬਾਤ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jaa utthee chalasee kantarraa taa koe na puchhai teree baat |2|
lines.english: But when the soul-husband arises and departs, then no one cares for you at all. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਸਾਹੁਰੈ ਵੰਞਣਾ ਸਭਿ ਮੁਕਲਾਵਣਹਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa saahurai vanyanaa sabh mukalaavanahaar |
lines.english: Everyone shall go to their Husband Lord. Everyone shall be given their ceremonial send-off after their marriage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਚਜੁ ਅਚਾਰੁ ਸਿਖੁ ਤੁਧੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਲਗੈ ਦੁਖੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur mil chaj achaar sikh tudh kade na lagai dukh |3|
lines.english: Meeting with the Guru, be a sincere student of proper conduct, and suffering shall never touch you. ||3||
